daily.today_energy: Your vibe is grounded but curious today. There's a gentle push toward trying something outside your usual routine—trust that instinct. The universe is testing your flexibility, and you're passing with flying colors.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, deep conversations are flowing easier than usual. Single? Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Either way, vulnerability is your superpower rn.
daily.career: Your hard work's about to get noticed in quiet ways. Don't need the spotlight to know you're crushing it. Keep showing up authentically—that's the real currency today.
daily.health: Your body's asking for more rest and intentional movement. Yoga, walks, or just stretching hits different today. Listen to what feels nourishing instead of what feels productive.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is asking you to slow down and trust your gut. You're entering a phase where your intuition hits different—lean into it. Mercury's vibes suggest a conversation or realization that shifts something small but meaningful in your world.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or floating solo, this week brings clarity through vulnerability. If there's something unspoken, the cosmic weather supports honest words. Single? Someone interesting might appear when you're genuinely just living your life.
weekly.career: Your efforts are building momentum even if you can't see it yet. This is the week to document your wins (yes, even small ones) and recalibrate your approach to something that's been stuck. Trust the process—growth rarely announces itself.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for consistency over intensity right now. Whatever movement makes you feel grounded—whether that's walks, yoga, or dancing alone—is your medicine this week. Rest hits different when you actually listen to what you need.
